docs.title: lo3
docs.text: lo3 is an interpreted token based programming language written in C.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
Feature Status ALU Operations ✅ Control Flow ❌ Func Calling ❌ Input/STDIN ✅ Output/STDOUT ✅ Operating with vars ✅ Operating with g[] ❌

→ Learn the syntax

docs.text:
• How do I start?

    Read the docs

  • Can I write Plugins for lo3?

    YES. Read the plugin-system/ for more informations. In there is a file called. Index read that at first.
